case_title: ST. LOUIS, GLEN vs. SEPAHER, MARTINA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ST. LOUIS, GLEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SEPAHER, MARTINA
